# sweb_vps_backup_settings (Resource)

Manages a VPS's auto-backup schedule (getSettings/saveSettings on /vps/backup). Destroying the resource resets the schedule to manual (auto-backups off).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage a VPS's auto-backup schedule. Destroying the resource resets it to
# manual (auto-backups off).
resource "sweb_vps_backup_settings" "infra_01" {
  billing_id = "login_vps_10" # from `sweb vps list` (BILLING_ID)
  mode       = "auto"
  frequency  = 7 # every 7 days
  time       = 3 # at 03:00
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `billing_id` (String) VPS service id (login_vps_N) whose schedule is managed.
- `mode` (String) Backup mode: "auto" or "manual".

### Optional

- `frequency` (Number) Auto-backup frequency in days (auto mode).
- `time` (Number) Auto-backup hour of day (auto mode).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource id (equals billing_id).
- `next_data_backup` (String) Timestamp of the next scheduled backup.
